zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Mordaunt於1390年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾時，她的父親Eustace de Mercaunt30歲，母親Alice de Alneto30歲。她於1406年與Sir John FitzRogers在英國薩默塞特阿生頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1441年10月6日在英國英格蘭多瑟特布陽斯頓享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特桑德福德聖 馬恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Mordaunt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French mordant ‘biting, sarcastic’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Mordaunt was born in 1390, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Eustace de Mercaunt, was 30 and her mother, Alice de Alneto, was 30. She married Sir John FitzRogers in 1406, in Ashington, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 6 October 1441, in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in St Martin's Church, Sandford, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Sir John FitzRogers en 1406, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 6 octobre 1441, à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à St Martin's Church, Sandford, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.St Martin's Church, Sandford, Dorset, En: 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 샌드퍼드 스트 마틴'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Mordaunt(이)가 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eustace de Mercaunt(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Alneto(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1406년 영국 서머세트 애신그턴에서 Sir John FitzRogers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 10월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브라이아스턴에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 샌드퍼드 스트 마틴'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

ru.St Martin's Church, Sandford, Dorset, En: ст мартин'с чурч, сэндфорд, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Mordaunt родилась в 1390 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Eustace de Mercaunt было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Alneto, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John FitzRogers в 1406 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 6 октября 1441 г. в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности ст мартин'с чурч, сэндфорд, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
